title: ardisia javanica
intro: Ardisia javanica, also known as the Javan ardisia or coral berry, is a plant species belonging to the family Primulaceae. It has been traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Ardisia javanica include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Ardisia javanica is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or infusion, and its herbal preparations can be found in various forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas.
